title: Medical Science Liaison, Lead (Associate Director) - Italy
Sr. Spclst, Value Market Access New Products Oncology
Pharma Medical Affairs
description:
Alma Laboris ha aperto le iscrizioni per i percorsi di eccellenza nell'Industria Farmaceutica, offrendo agevolazioni di inserimento professionale per il progresso di carriera. L'obiettivo primario è formare e specializzare individui da presentare alle aziende partner del network.


**Il percorso formativo, denominato "Master Pharma Medical Affairs: Direzione Medica nel Farmaceutico," include approfondimenti su argomenti chiave come:**



* Il Ciclo di Vita del Prodotto Farmaceutico


* L'Evoluzione accelerata del Medical Affairs: Ruoli, Responsabilità e Competenze


* Generare Evidenze per Creare Valore in Medical Affairs: Qualità, autenticità e prova di ogni risultato


* + Ricerca Pre\-Clinica e Clinica: dove nascono le "Evidenze"
	+ Elementi di Metodologia e Statistica: le "Evidenze" in Medicina
	+ Progettazione e Realizzazione delle "Evidenze"
	+ Farmacovigilanza e Medical Affairs: Il Paziente al Centro!
	+ Affari Regolatori, Affari Legali e Medical Affairs: un Rapporto Indissolubile
	+ Farmacoeconomia e Medical Affairs: dare Valore Economico alle Evidenze Cliniche
Il programma offre anche un supporto individuale da parte di un tutor esperto del settore, un portale "Network" per candidarsi alle offerte di lavoro delle aziende partner e la promozione del profilo per interviste in diverse posizioni aperte.



I requisiti per partecipare includono coloro che attualmente ricoprono ruoli aziendali, professionisti specializzati, titolari e/o collaboratori di aziende, laureati del settore e giovani professionisti provenienti da altri percorsi di studio previa valutazione. Il tasso di successo del placement è del 90%.



Alma Laboris Business School, con oltre 25 anni di esperienza nel settore della formazione, offre percorsi pratici di alta formazione per una rapida applicazione nel mondo del lavoro. Grazie alla sua competenza e al team qualificato, rappresenta un punto di riferimento per le aziende che cercano di potenziare e/o ampliare il proprio business attraverso profili specializzati.


**Con la presentazione della candidatura, i partecipanti riceveranno informazioni dettagliate.**


**Il presente annuncio è rivolto a entrambi i sessi, ai sensi delle leggi 903/77 e 125/91, e a persone di tutte le età e nazionalità, ai sensi dei decreti legislativi 215/03 e 216/03\.**

title: Pricing & Reimbursement Sr Advisor
description:
**Pricing \& Reimbursement Sr Advisor**
=======================================

Category: Market Access
Location:
Roma, Lazio, IT  

Are you ready to shape how innovative therapies reach the patients who need them most in Italy? Join us as a Pricing \& Reimbursement Sr Advisor and play a pivotal role in securing market access for treatments that change lives across serious chronic diseases.

  


**Your new role**  

As Pricing \& Reimbursement Sr Advisor, you will be at the heart of our market access efforts in Italy, building strong relationships with key relevant stakeholders, while securing timely reimbursement for our portfolio. You will navigate the complexity of the Italian healthcare system and translate the value of our products into compelling submissions and negotiations with AIFA.



Day\-to\-day your tasks will include:


* Leading the end\-to\-end preparation, submission and negotiation of Pricing \& Reimbursement dossiers to AIFA, ensuring alignment with local regulations and corporate strategic goals
* Developing local pricing strategies and value propositions, including budget impact models, cost\-effectiveness analyses, HTA and HEOR tailored to the Italian healthcare system
* Building and maintaining relationships with key stakeholders to shape the external environment
* Partnering with Global and Regional teams to influence pricing assumptions and secure alignment on local launch strategies
* Communicating the unique attributes of our therapeutic area products to external multi\-stakeholders to defend and maximise the value proposition
* Collaborating cross\-functionally with Medical, Marketing, Regulatory and Market Access colleagues to integrate P\&R strategy across the product lifecycle
* Monitoring AIFA procedures, therapeutic registries, regional funding dynamics to anticipate risks and identify opportunities

  


**Your new department**  

As part of External Affairs Department, our commitment is to serve patients and build high\-value, sustainable partnerships across the healthcare ecosystem. As a highly integrated and strategic division, the External Affairs encompasses Pricing \& Reimbursement, Regional Market Access, Public Affairs, and External Communications. Given the dynamic and complex nature of our environment, cross\-functional collaboration is our cornerstone. Within External Affairs, you will join our affiliate in Rome, working closely with a dedicated team committed to ensuring that patients in Italy benefit from our innovative therapies as quickly as possible. You will contribute directly to shaping the access landscape and bringing transformative treatments to the Italian healthcare system.

  


**Your skills \& qualifications**  

To be successful in this position, you have a scientific background and a strong track record in Market Access in the Italian pharmaceutical environment. You combine technical expertise with a customer\-centric mindset and the ability to influence across stakeholders.


* A scientific background and a minimum of 5 years' experience in Market Access, HTA or HEOR with a clear focus on pricing and reimbursement
* Deep understanding of the Italian pharmaceutical regulatory framework, including AIFA procedures, therapeutic registries, regional funding dynamics
* Proven ability to design and execute integrated payer value propositions, pricing and HE analyses
* Customer\-centric mindset with excellent stakeholder management skills, both internally and with external key opinion leaders
* Highly performant with a strong focus on delivering great results, even in complex environments with few defined procedures
* Fluent in English and Italian, both written and spoken

  


**Working at Novo Nordisk**  

Every day we seek the solutions that defeat serious chronic diseases. To do this, we approach our work with determination, constant curiosity and a commitment to finding better ways forward. For over 100 years, this dedication has driven us to build a company focused on lasting change for long\-term health. One where diverse thinking, shared purpose and mutual respect come together to create extraordinary results. When you join us, you're not just starting a job – you're becoming part of a story that spans generations.

  


**What we offer**



At Novo Nordisk, you’ll join a global healthcare company with a unique culture and strong results. We offer continuous learning, career development, and benefits tailored to your life and career stage.


**Salary:**For this role, the Annual Base Salary ranges from 53,180\.00 to 82,430\.00 EUR, corresponding to the level of the position.



The placement within the salary range will be assessed during the recruitment process based on the candidate’s skills, competencies, knowledge, and relevant experience.


**Incentives and Benefits:**The salary package may include short\-term and/or long\-term incentives as well as other employee benefits based on position level, location, functional area and relevant market benchmarks.



Learn more about our Reward Philosophy here.

  


**Deadline**  

24 June 2026\. Applications are reviewed on an ongoing basis, so please submit your application as soon as possible.


We commit to an inclusive recruitment process and equality of opportunity for all our job applicants.



At Novo Nordisk, we're not chasing quick fixes – we're creating lasting change for long\-term health. For over 100 years, we've been driven by a single purpose: to defeat serious chronic diseases and help millions of people live healthier lives. This dedication fuels our constant curiosity and inspires us to push the boundaries of what's possible in healthcare. We embrace diverse perspectives, seek out bold ideas, and build partnerships rooted in shared purpose. Together, we're making healthcare more accessible, treating and preventing diseases, and pioneering solutions that create change spanning generations. When you join us, you become part of something bigger – a legacy of impact that reaches far beyond today.
company_description: Novo Nordisk is a global healthcare company, driving change to defeat diabetes and other serious chronic diseases such as obesity, and rare blood and rare endocrine disease

title: Sales Support Associate
description:
**Job Requisition No**

 VN8455  

**Work Location Name**

 Italy \- Rome  

**Worker Basis**

 Full Time  

**Worker Type**

 Employee  

**Contract Type**

 Permanent  

**Applications Close Date**

 Jul 31, 2026  

**Purpose**


As a Sales Support Associate, you will play a critical role in supporting European sales efforts for both direct and indirect markets. Your position is essential in ensuring the smooth operation and success of our sales team by providing comprehensive administrative and operational support. You will be responsible for assisting with sales activities, managing customer inquiries, processing orders, and maintaining accurate records. By coordinating with various departments, you will help to streamline sales processes and enhance customer satisfaction. Your efforts will contribute to the overall achievement of sales targets and the growth of our business in the European market.  

  

Offered Salary Range: €28\.000 – 32\.000  

CCNL: Chimico Farmaceutico

 **Key Responsibilities**


PRICE ACTIVITIES


* Support Sales management strategy for price management, entering price offers on the Company's ERP (agreement or price list) utilising processes developed as instructed by the team coordinator.
* Review price offers received from sales reps or sales managers, to ensure they are compliant with our internal policies and ensure they are saved and uploaded inside the system as indicated by the coordinator.


TENDERS (Administration of International tenders)


* Through proactive review of Tender Managements system (country relevant) apply for appropriate tenders on a daily basis.
* Co\-ordinate with Sales to structure price offer.
* Review, add to and organise all supporting documents required for completion of tenders (liaising with Sales, Marketing, QA, Regulatory etc.)
* Timely manage the samples requirement
* Proactive follow up on contracts ensuring price updates are effected in timely manner
* Ensure Sales team(s) appraised of outcomes, develop and maintain proactive notification for contract renewals
* For direct markets create turnover declarations for purchasing groups and tender businesses, submitting to finance for audit approval.


ADMIN TASKS


* Deal with various local admin tasks based on demand
* Any customer mailings – translations, mail merge
* Organise shipments of capital equipment demos
* Complete tasks given by line manager within agreed timescales
* Interpret \& respond clearly, effectively \& professionally to spoken requests by phone or in person, and to verbal or written instructions
* Perform duties in an efficient, professional and courteous manner
* Maintain regular consistent attendance, punctuality, professional appearance, and adherence to relevant health \& safety procedures
  

  

**Qualification**

* Fluent in Italian and English
* Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or a related field is preferred, but not mandatory
* Proven experience in a sales support or administrative role, preferably within a sales or customer service environment
* Attention to detail and accuracy in data entry and record\-keeping
* Familiarity with sales processes and the ability to support sales teams effectively
* Knowledge of order processing, inventory management, and logistics
  

  

**Company**


BVI® is refocusing the future of vision.  

  

As one of the fastest\-growing, diversified surgical ophthalmic businesses in the world, our purpose\-built portfolio of trusted brands includes: Beaver® (Knives and Blades), Visitec® (Cannulas), Malosa® (Single\-Use Instruments), Vitreq® (Vitreoretinal Surgical Products) and PhysIOL® (Premium IOLs), and spans more than 90 countries.  

  

We’ve set our sights on touching the lives of millions of patients affected by conditions such as cataracts, refractive error, glaucoma, retinal disease, and dry eye. Unburdened by legacy or bureaucracy, we have developed our strategy around a simple concept – taking pride in delivering innovative solutions for our physicians and patients, based on their needs. We trust and empower our associates to make decisions and solve problems because collaboration drives us. Valuing agility, simplicity, and transparency, we stay committed to listening to our customers, delivering for our patients, and keeping the future in focus.  

  

Learn more at www.bvimedical.com

Standard (Mon\-Fri)**Environmental Conditions**


Office**Job Description**


As part of the Thermo Fisher Scientific team, you’ll discover meaningful work that makes a positive impact on a global scale. Join our colleagues in bringing our Mission to life every single day to enable our customers to make the world healthier, cleaner and safer. We provide our global teams with the resources needed to achieve individual career goals while helping to take science a step beyond by developing solutions for some of the world’s toughest challenges, like protecting the environment, making sure our food is safe or helping find cures for cancer.

Join our collaborative team as a Business Management Manager at Thermo Fisher Scientific, where you'll contribute to customer success and business growth. You'll lead a team of Business Managers while serving as the primary liaison between our organization and key clients, ensuring exceptional service delivery and strong partnerships. This position offers the opportunity to develop strategic business relationships, optimize operational efficiency, and contribute directly to our mission of enabling customers to make the world healthier, cleaner, and safer.

* Advanced Degree plus 6 years of experience, or Bachelor's Degree plus 8 years of experience in pharmaceutical/chemical industry, preferably in CMO/CDMO environment
* Preferred Fields of Study: Science, Business Management, or related technical field

* People management experience leading cross\-functional teams
* Proficiency in contract negotiations and Master Supply Agreement (MSA) management
* Financial acumen for budgeting, forecasting, and pricing strategies
* Experience in client relationship management and strategic account development
* Project management capabilities with focus on technology transfer and commercial operations
* Demonstrated success in business development and revenue growth
* Analytical and problem\-solving skills

* Ability to travel up to 30% for client meetings and site visits
* Experience in managing multi\-million dollar client portfolios
* Change management and process improvement capabilities

title: Farmacista collaboratore/collaboratrice - Rieti
description:
Unisciti al nostro team e contribuisci al benessere delle persone!
  
  

Chi siamo
  
  

Farma Acquisition Holding, parte del The Boots Group, è un Retailer Farmaceutico che gestisce oltre 90 Farmacie di proprietà presenti in più di 10 regioni italiane.
  
  

Le nostre radici affondano negli anni '70 con Alleanza Farmaceutica, storica realtà della Distribuzione all'ingrosso di farmaci. Da questa esperienza è nato il nostro percorso nella gestione diretta delle Farmacie, con l'obiettivo di offrire un servizio sempre più vicino alle persone e ai bisogni di salute delle comunità locali.
  
  

Nel 2018 Boots è arrivata in Italia, portando con sé una storia iniziata nel 1849 nel Regno Unito e un'esperienza riconosciuta a livello internazionale nel campo della salute, del benessere, dell'innovazione e della qualità del servizio.
  
  

In Boots crediamo che la Farmacia sia molto più di un luogo dove dispensare farmaci: è uno spazio di ascolto, prevenzione e consulenza, in cui ogni professionista può contribuire concretamente al benessere delle persone e fare la differenza ogni giorno.
  
  

Per le nostre Farmacie di Rieti siamo alla ricerca di un/una Farmacista che desideri crescere in un ambiente dinamico, innovativo e orientato alla qualità del servizio.
  
  

Principali attività
  
  

La risorsa sarà inserita all’interno della Farmacia e contribuirà allo svolgimento delle attività professionali, operative e gestionali necessarie al corretto funzionamento del punto vendita.
  
  

Si occuperà della dispensazione di farmaci, parafarmaci e prodotti per la salute, della consulenza qualificata al cliente/paziente e della vendita assistita di dispositivi medici, integratori, prodotti dermocosmetici, articoli sanitari e prodotti per il benessere.
  
  

Parteciperà inoltre all’erogazione dei Servizi di Farmacia e della “Farmacia dei Servizi”, inclusi Servizi di screening, prevenzione, autoanalisi, prenotazioni, telemedicina e altre prestazioni attivabili secondo la normativa vigente.
  
  

La risorsa supporterà il Team nelle attività di gestione del magazzino, riordino, controllo delle scorte, verifica delle scadenze, corretta conservazione dei prodotti, utilizzo dei gestionali aziendali e gestione degli adempimenti amministrativi e documentali.
  
  

Collaborerà, inoltre, al rispetto della normativa di settore e delle procedure relative ai rapporti con ASL/ATS ed enti competenti, alla gestione dei farmaci stupefacenti, alla tracciabilità, alla farmacovigilanza e agli ulteriori adempimenti previsti per l’esercizio dell’attività farmaceutica.
  
  

Completano le attività la collaborazione con il Team di Farmacia, il rispetto delle procedure aziendali e il contributo al mantenimento di elevati standard di qualità del servizio, efficienza gestionale e continuità operativa.
  
  

Competenze e capacità richieste
  
  

Cerchiamo una persona con solida preparazione professionale, orientamento alla qualità del servizio e attenzione alla relazione con il cliente/paziente.
  
  

Sono richieste capacità di ascolto, comunicazione e consulenza, unite a precisione, affidabilità e senso di responsabilità nello svolgimento delle attività quotidiane.
  
  

Completano il profilo spirito di collaborazione, flessibilità organizzativa, attitudine al lavoro in team e interesse a contribuire all’evoluzione della farmacia come presidio sanitario di prossimità, nel rispetto degli standard professionali, aziendali e normativi.
  
  

Cosa offriamo
  
CCNL Farmacie Private
  
Contratto a tempo indeterminato
  
Formazione continua in ambito scientifico, consulenziale e gestionale
  
Sistema incentivante legato ai risultati
  
Percorsi di crescita professionale all'interno del Gruppo
  
Ambiente collaborativo e orientato al benessere delle persone
  
Work\-life balance garantito
  
  

Retribuzione e benefit
  
RAL indicativa tra € 30\.000 ed € 36\.000, commisurata all'esperienza e alle competenze
  
Buoni pasto
  
Sistema premiante annuale
  
  

Percorsi di sviluppo professionale e manageriale
  
  

Fai la differenza nella vita delle persone unendo la tua professionalità alla nostra missione!
  
Se sei un/una Farmacista appassionato/a, motivato/a e desideroso/a di lavorare in un contesto dinamico e innovativo, non esitare a candidarti.
  
  

Farma Acquisition Holding \- Farmacie Boots ti aspetta per costruire insieme un futuro dedicato alla salute e al benessere.

title: T3 Project Lead
description:
**Job title: T3 Project Lead**

**Location**: Anagni, Italy

**About the Job**


As T3 Project Lead within our Engineering \& Maintenance Team, you’ll be part of a team of qualified professionals, managing strategic engineering projects and ensuring operational excellence of the facilities.


Ready to get started?

  



**About Sanofi:**


We’re an R\&D\-driven, AI\-powered biopharma company committed to improving people’s lives and delivering compelling growth. Our deep understanding of the immune system – and innovative pipeline – enables us to invent medicines and vaccines that treat and protect millions of people around the world. Together, we chase the miracles of science to improve people’s lives.

**Main Responsibilities:**

* Lead Tier 3 capital project studies including driving each stage gate review, supporting site, and M\&S decision making process
* End\-to\-end capital project delivery for projects up to €5M including initiation, feasibility, design, execution, C\&Q, handover, \& close\-out
* To develop Block Flow Diagram, Process Flow Diagram, material and energy balances, P\&ID’s, data sheets of equipment, of instruments and of safety devices, Technical Specification/URS for Request for Quotation, Technical alignment of vendors/supplier’s quotation.
* Monthly capital project reporting on all project KPIs for safety, cost, schedule, and resources
* Adherence to all mandatory Sanofi and local \& regulatory compliance standards and policies, including construction safety GMRs, Planet Care standards, GMP, and FDA regulations/standards
* Foster a safety first, quality always culture throughout the project implementing SMS 2\.0 and TRT ways of working
* Ensure staffing of all engineering project resources and align cross\-function strategic workforce plan to delivery projects

**About You**

* **Experience**: capital project engineering and/or project delivery experience as a Technical Engineer in pharmaceutical manufacturing, process engineering, and/or building \& utilities.
* **Soft and technical skills**: Project management experience managing process \& construction safety, budgets, schedules, risk, and resources for multip discpliine capex project; regulatory knowledge with familiarity of GMP, FDA, ISPE guidelines, building \& construction regulations/standards; stakeholder \& People Management skills working cross\-functionally in a matrix organization (Maintenance, Priduction, Validation, Validation assurance, Utilties, Planning etc.); project Management/Project Controls skills managing budgets, schedules; commissioning and Qualification knowledge; black utilities knowledge; HVAC knowledge; pharma processes knowledge; automation knowledge; Electrical knowledge; computer literate (ACAD, Microsoft project, word, excel, PowerPoint); communication skills, changes evaluation abilities, risks analysis abilities, and resources planning.
* **Education**: Chemical, Mechanical, or Electrical engineering degree with a professional engineering designation preferred, e.g., PE, P.Eng. Charter Eng.
* **Languages**: Fluency in Italian and English (additional languages are a plus)

***Why choose us?***

* Be part of a pioneering biopharma company where patient insights shape drug development.
* Work at the forefront of AI\-powered science that accelerates discovery and improves outcomes.
* Collaborate beyond your expertise, sparking new ideas with diverse, multidisciplinary teams.
* Explore bold career paths – with opportunities to grow through scientific, leadership, and cross\-functional moves.
* Care for yourself and your loved ones with generous health and well\-being benefits, including top\-tier healthcare and 14 weeks’ gender\-neutral parental leave.

**Pursue** *Progress*. **Discover** *Extraordinary*.


Join Sanofi and step into a new era of science \- where your growth can be just as transformative as the work we do. We invest in you to reach further, think faster, and do what’s never\-been\-done\-before. You’ll help push boundaries, challenge convention, and build smarter solutions that reach the communities we serve. Ready to chase the miracles of science and improve people’s lives? Let’s Pursue *Progress* and Discover *Extraordinary* – together.


At Sanofi, we provide equal opportunities to all regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law.


\#LI\-EUR


\#LI\-Onsite
company_description: We chase the miracles of science every single day, pursuing progress to make a real impact on millions of patients around the world.

title: Stage nel dipartimento di GCTO
description:
Job Description

**Stage nel dipartimento di GCTO**

**Luogo**: Roma

**Modalità**: Ibrida

**Rimborso spese:** €800 lordi al mese

**Durata**: Lo stage verrà strutturato su un periodo di 12 mesi.


Stage iniziale di 6 mesi con possibilità di rinnovo di altri 6 mesi. La possibilità di attivare anche uno stage curricolare costituisce un elemento preferenziale.


Il paziente è al centro di tutto ciò che facciamo, motivo per cui i nostri team si concentrano sulla ricerca di soluzioni e trattamenti per alcune delle malattie più difficili del mondo. Il candidato verrà inserito nel nostro dipartimento a supporto dell’attività lavorativa.


Il profilo del candidato verrà inserito in un percorso formativo in accordo al suo background di studi e le aspirazioni professionali grazie al quale potrà accrescere le proprie competenze professionali collaborando attivamente con tutto il team.

**COSA CERCHIAMO**


Il candidato verrà inserito nel dipartimento ***Ricerca Clinica***.


L’**Obiettivo** principale dello stage è fornire al Tirocinante le competenze necessarie per garantire un corretto e completo svolgimento delle attività richieste all’attivazione e alla successiva conduzione degli studi clinici nell’ambito della Sperimentazione Clinica dei Medicinali.

**Attività:**


**Attività del progetto formativo:**

* *Percorso Monitoraggio*:


	+ Supporto nell’archiviazione e nella riconciliazione dei documenti;
	+ Affiancamento nella compilazione di tabelle ed aggiornamento di sistemi utilizzati nella conduzione dello studio;
	+ Contatti con Comitati etici ed amministrazioni ospedaliere nonché con centri sperimentali;
	+ Supporto al Clinical Research Associate durante le attività svolte sullo studio, anche tramite visite di affiancamento presso i centri Sperimentali.

**Profilo:**

* Provenienza da studi di laurea in discipline scientifiche.
* Partecipazione Master in Ricerca Clinica o affini.
* Buon uso del PC, pacchetti Office: Word, Excel, Posta Elettronica.
* Conoscenza della lingua inglese.
* Buone doti analitiche, precisione e organizzazione, proattività e problem solving, ottime capacità relazionali e autonomia nel portare a termine compiti assegnati.
* Propensione al lavoro di team.
* Flessibilità e dinamicità.

**Quali benefici otterrai?**

  

Facendo il tuo tirocinio presso la nostra azienda avrai l'opportunità di crescere all'interno di una delle aziende farmaceutiche leader a livello mondiale.

* Avrai un‘esperienza pratica all'interno dell'industria farmaceutica
* Lavorare in un ambiente di lavoro stimolante e dinamico
* Sviluppare capacità analitiche e di problem solving

**Pari opportunità**

  

Siamo orgogliosi di essere un'azienda che riunisce persone diverse, di talento e impegnate. Il modo più veloce per innovare è unire idee diverse in un ambiente inclusivo. Creiamo un ambiente in cui i nostri dipendenti possono sfidare rispettosamente il pensiero degli altri e affrontare i problemi collettivamente. Garantiamo pari opportunità, con l'impegno a promuovere un ambiente di lavoro diversificato e inclusivo.

**Required Skills:**

Animal Euthanasia, Animal Euthanasia, Clinical Medicine, Clinical Pharmacy, Clinical Research, Clinical Trials, Clinical Trials Analysis, Cloud Data Catalog, Data Analysis, Database Management, Data Science, Data Security, Data Visualization, Data Wrangling, Detail\-Oriented, Event Planning, Key Performance Indicators (KPI), Language Assessments, Pharmacogenetics, Project Management, Python (Programming Language), Software Proficiency, Team Management, Team Operations, Vendor Relationship Management {\+ 2 more}**Preferred Skills:**

title: Creative Producer
description:
**CapsLock** is a dynamic marketing company providing IT\-enabled solutions for large North American partners. We specialize in scalable customer acquisition through data\-driven marketing, creative production, and technology innovation.


Our teams collaborate across marketing, IT, analytics, and media buying to build, test, and optimize high\-performing funnels that help clients achieve predictable growth across industries such as Home Improvement, Health, Legal, and Insurance.

  

We’re looking for a **Creative Producer** who thinks like a researcher \- someone who senses trends, understands storytelling, and knows how to turn marketing insights into videos that actually sell.


Your role is not only production, but to lead creative evolution \- generating ideas, refining proven creative approaches, finding new styles, testing them, and scaling what works. You’ll work at the intersection of project management, creative, analytics, and production.


You’ll also shape and pitch creative concepts that challenge existing ad formats and explore new storytelling angles.

 **Responsibilities:**

* Monitor and document emerging video trends across Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and other platforms.
* Market and Content development Research
* Research new video styles, not just iterate on existing ones.
* Translate insights into creative hypotheses.
* Project management, supporting various teams from idea to delivery
* Ensure each concept accurately reflects the client’s value proposition and target audience.
* Coordinate creators, influencers, and bloggers.
* Develop and manage test plans with media buyers to validate creative hypotheses.
* Review performance data (CTR, hook rate, watch time, CPA).
Understand a consistent “create test learn* scale” workflow for ongoing creative optimization.

Communicating effectively between marketing, creation and testing departments.  
* 

  

**AI \& Experimentation Mindset:**


You know how to experiment with AI tools \- from generating references in Midjourney to using Claude to organise your workspace. We don’t expect you to know every tool, but we value a “prompt\-first” mindset \- when you create faster than you search.

  

Requirements:  

  

**Essential**

* 3\+ years of experience in marketing \- ideally within paid social or performance marketing.
* Solid understanding of short\-form video formats and what drives performance on Meta, TikTok, and YouTube.
* Comfortable collaborating with creators and bloggers: sourcing, briefing, and overseeing remote shoots.
* Confident in interpreting marketing performance data.
* Exceptional communication and organization skills \- able to keep projects on track, people aligned, and expectations clear.
* Strong attention to detail, accountability, and the ability to prioritize multiple projects effectively.

Fluent English \- both spoken and written  
* 

  

**Nice to Have**

* Experience in media buying or working closely with media buyers.
* Familiarity with AI tools for generating or enhancing creative assets.
* Video production or video marketing background.
* Experience using UGC or influencer platforms to source and manage creators.
* Understanding of A/B testing and how creative experiments are structured and analyzed.

 **Why do we deserve your attention?**


Not only do we offer fair and competitive pay, but we also provide perks and benefits that support your well\-being and growth. Here are some of them:

 **Remote Work**


We are a truly remote\-first company. You choose where you feel the most productive and comfortable to make an impact.

 **Paid Time Off**


Work\-life balance matters to us, and we support it with paid time off for rest, personal time, or simply doing what makes you happy.

 **Ongoing Learning**


We believe in curiosity and growth. That’s why we support continuous learning with workshops, online courses, conferences, and certifications.

 **Home Office**


We help you set up your perfect workspace by covering equipment and furniture expenses, so you can do your best work from home.

 **Physical Well\-Being**


From gym memberships and yoga classes to home workout equipment or even a bicycle, we give you the flexibility to stay active your way.

 **Unlimited Sick Days**


Your health matters. Take the time you need to rest and recover \- we’ll be here when you’re ready to return.

 **Medical Coverage**


We support you and your family with reimbursement for medical insurance and health\-related expenses, including dental care and psychological support.

 **Co\-Working Space**


If you sometimes crave a change of scenery or more social interaction, we’ll cover the full cost of a co\-working space.

 **Fun Stuff**


From gaming nights and fitness challenges to annual retreats at world\-class resorts, we make sure there’s never a shortage of fun and connection.

title: Technology Transfer Engineer
description:
**Job Requisition No**

 VN8456  

**Work Location Name**

 Italy \- Rome  

**Worker Basis**

 Full Time  

**Worker Type**

 Employee  

**Contract Type**

 Permanent  

**Applications Close Date**

 Dec 31, 2026  

**Purpose**


As a Technology Transfer Engineer, you will lead operations for new technologies and platforms within the capital equipment division. Your responsibilities will include developing innovative solutions for manufacturing, testing, and validating cutting\-edge electro\-mechanical systems to achieve top\-level status within the industry.  

In this role within a dynamic international environment, you will collaborate with leading technical partners worldwide to make the foundations for the BVI capital equipment portfolio. Additionally, you will lead and support lifecycle management projects focused on enhancing manufacturing processes to improve quality, capacity, and cost\-effectiveness.Lead international New Product Introduction (NPI) projects and initiatives, providing technical expertise.  

  

**Key Responsibilities**

* Provide system engineering support for corporate projects.
* Serve as a core team member for new product development, collaborating with manufacturing, supply chain, sourcing, and other operations groups to develop and execute optimal plans.
* Introduce and validate new manufacturing technologies, including capital and capacity planning.
* Oversee design controls operations documentation, including plans, protocols, reports, test methods, work instructions, PFMEAs, and control plans, contributing to global regulatory submissions.
* Act as the voice of operations within the design cycle, conducting Design for Excellence (DfX) reviews and ensuring alignment with lean manufacturing principles.
* Partner with R\&D to ensure manufacturing infrastructure supports product design and overall project and business needs.
* Conduct process studies to identify opportunities for improving the manufacturing process.
  

  

**Qualification**

* Master’s degree in engineering (mechanical/electrical/biomedical) and 5\+ years of relevant experience, or equivalent combination of education, training, and experience working in a highly regulated industry (medical sector preferred)
* Strong engineering problem\-solving skills
* Understanding of ISO 13485, ISO 14971, FDA CFR part 820
* Excellent analytical skills, providing effective support in decisions based on factual data and analysis
* Expertise in process design and development, including experience with prototyping development and acceptance
* Ability to work internationally, with expected travel time ranging from 25% to 50%
* Ability to evaluate, triage, and mitigate risks, both for product and project
* High\-level knowledge and understanding of electrical wiring and connections, PCBA, and management of electronics (ECAD knowledge will be considered a plus)
* High level Knowledge of and understanding of design and manufacturing of custom mechanical parts (MCAD knowledge will be considered a plus)


**Offered Salary Range:** €55,000–€65,000  

**CCNL:** Metalmeccanici Industria  

  

**Company**


BVI® is refocusing the future of vision.  

  

As one of the fastest\-growing, diversified surgical ophthalmic businesses in the world, our purpose\-built portfolio of trusted brands includes: Beaver® (Knives and Blades), Visitec® (Cannulas), Malosa® (Single\-Use Instruments), Vitreq® (Vitreoretinal Surgical Products) and PhysIOL® (Premium IOLs), and spans more than 90 countries.  

  

We’ve set our sights on touching the lives of millions of patients affected by conditions such as cataracts, refractive error, glaucoma, retinal disease, and dry eye. Unburdened by legacy or bureaucracy, we have developed our strategy around a simple concept – taking pride in delivering innovative solutions for our physicians and patients, based on their needs. We trust and empower our associates to make decisions and solve problems because collaboration drives us. Valuing agility, simplicity, and transparency, we stay committed to listening to our customers, delivering for our patients, and keeping the future in focus.  

  

Learn more at www.bvimedical.com
